mechanism: 12-24 month monetary transmission lags from 2022-23 tightening disproportionately affect bank-funded small caps (35-40% floating rate). Current small-cap distress may be a lagged tightening effect rather than a forward-looking deterioration signal.
regime_dependence: Operative while Fed funds rate remains elevated. If Fed eases and small-cap margins stabilize, transmission-lag interpretation is validated. If margins deepen despite easing, input-cost thesis gains.
